cards.title: Emotional maturity and raising healthy children
cards.body: Psychologist Lindsay C Gibson, author of the pandemic bestseller 'Adult Children of Emotionally Immature Parents,' offers guidance on developing emotional maturity at any age. Her book unexpectedly resonated with millions during the pandemic by addressing how unmet emotional needs affect adult children. Gibson now provides practical advice for parents seeking to raise happy, healthy children by modeling emotional awareness.

cards.title: Parenting teenagers through A-level exams challenges
cards.body: Parents of teenagers taking A-levels often feel helpless when supporting subjects like chemistry and further maths that stretch their own knowledge. Columnist Zoe Williams explores the unique impotence of parenting during high-stakes exams when flashcards and understanding seem inadequate. The piece captures the tension between wanting to help and recognizing the limits of parental involvement.

cards.title: What fathers truly value on Father's Day
cards.body: Research shows that many dads prioritize feeling loved, appreciated, and truly seen by their families over material gifts. Father's Day doesn't require complicated or expensive presents when emotional connection is what matters most. Understanding what fathers genuinely value can help families celebrate more meaningfully.

cards.title: Community table initiative builds mothers' social networks
cards.body: A new mother in Manchester, England created a simple solution to combat the isolation and limited social interaction that often accompanies early parenthood. Her initiative has since spread throughout the UK, helping mothers build community connections. The approach demonstrates how small, intentional efforts can address the mental health challenges of early motherhood.

cards.title: Role of mothers extends beyond family units
cards.body: The role of motherhood functions like a broad-spectrum antibiotic, extending far beyond the immediate family and providing healing influence in multiple dimensions of life. Research on motherhood reveals its transformative impact on personal identity and community contribution. Understanding motherhood's broader significance helps recognize its value in shaping individuals and society.
